description_long: This is a single pair of traditional chopsticks, featuring a rich red lacquered finish adorned with delicate floral patterns, likely inspired by cherry blossoms. The chopsticks are slender and taper smoothly from a squared, decorated handle to a fine, rounded tip. Two thin gold bands encircle the upper section, adding a touch of elegance and visual separation from the floral motif. The surface appears glossy and smooth, suggesting a protective lacquer coating over a wooden core. The chopsticks are lightweight and finely crafted, suitable for precise handling of food. Their overall appearance is decorative yet functional, making them ideal for both everyday dining and special occasions.
description: A pair of red lacquered chopsticks with floral patterns and gold bands, featuring a glossy, smooth finish and tapered design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, floral patterns, and gold bands on the handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the squared, decorated handle and the narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the floral motif and the smooth taper to the tip.
description_view_3: View from the tip end, showing the two chopsticks closely aligned and the decorated handle.
attribute_orientation: aligned lengthwise parallel to the supporting surface
attribute_context: The chopsticks are isolated on a plain, white background with no other objects visible.
attribute_arrangement: paired together, closely aligned side by side
attribute_proximity_to_food_containers: separated from any food containers, with no bowls or plates visible nearby
